title: lobelia flaccida subsp. flaccida
intro: Lobelia flaccida subsp. flaccida, also known as the palecardinal flower or flaccid lobelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as a stimulant and expectorant to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and acting as an antioxidant. Lobelia flaccida subsp. flaccida can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction for various herbal preparations, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
